prospect.Summary: It's fair to be skeptical of Wimmer's 2024 Low-A performance — .285/.362/.435, 14 home runs, 34 stolen bases — both because of his age and his big school background, but his ability at shortstop is a constant that will play at every level. He has poise, grace, good hands, and plenty of arm. Expect Wimmer's strikeouts to climb as he traverses the minors; he lacks bat control but has enough power to be dangerous against pitches down and in. It should be enough offense for Wimmer to play a bench infield role.
